task_completion.visual_evidence: The Tor Browser window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Visit api.ipify.org to extract the IP address
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser's address bar shows 'api.ipify.org' and the webpage displays an IP address.

task_completion.description: Visit icanhazip.com to extract the IP address
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser's address bar shows 'icanhazip.com' and the webpage displays an IP address.

task_completion.description: Visit checkip.amazonaws.com to extract the IP address
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser's address bar shows 'checkip.amazonaws.com' and the webpage displays an IP address.

task_completion.description: Create or open the target JSON file for editing
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal is open showing the file path '/home/ga/Documents/isolation_audit.json'.

task_completion.description: Document the observed IPs in the JSON file using the URLs as keys
task_completion.visual_evidence: The content of the JSON file is visible, showing keys 'api.ipify.org', 'icanhazip.com', and 'checkip.amazonaws.com', each mapped to an IP address value.

integrity.description: The agent used Tor Browser to check the IPs, not a standard browser or terminal curl commands without Tor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser used to visit the IP-echo services has Tor Browser branding, onion routing UI elements, or is clearly identifiable as Tor Browser.

integrity.description: The IP addresses written to the JSON file match the ones actually observed during the browsing session.
integrity.visual_evidence: The IP values typed into the JSON file correspond exactly to the IPs displayed on the screen when the agent visited the respective websites.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the JSON file to the file system rather than just printing the JSON structure to a terminal or leaving it unsaved in an editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of saving the file in a text editor (e.g., no 'unsaved' indicator) or a terminal command confirming the file was written to '/home/ga/Documents/isolation_audit.json'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file must be located exactly at '/home/ga/Documents/isolation_audit.json'. The required domains that must be used as keys in the JSON file are 'api.ipify.org', 'icanhazip.com', and 'checkip.amazonaws.com'.
